sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57543" key="kirsotomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κιρσο-τομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n57543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">operation to remove varicocele</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.18</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
